hooks.command: bash -c 'ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); cd "$ROOT"; if command -v graphify >/dev/null 2>&1; then graphify . --update --quiet 2>/dev/null; if [ -f "GRAPH_REPORT.md" ]; then echo "=== GRAPHIFY KNOWLEDGE GRAPH (auto-loaded) ==="; cat GRAPH_REPORT.md; echo "=== END GRAPH REPORT ==="; echo "[graphify] Use graphify query \"<question>\" or graphify explain \"<concept>\" instead of reading raw files to save ~30x tokens."; else echo "[graphify] Graph built but GRAPH_REPORT.md not found — run graphify . manually once."; fi; else echo "[graphify] Not installed. Run: pip install graphifyy && graphify install && graphify ."; fi'
